articles.title: Active-duty Everett firefighter dies from occupational cancer after 30 years of service, department says
articles.description:
John Benoit, 63, served in the Air Force before fulfilling his "family legacy" of becoming an Everett firefighter, his obituary says.

The post Active-duty Everett firefighter dies from occupational cancer after 30 years of service, department says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: John Benoit, 63, died from occupational cancer after 30 years as an Everett firefighter.
Benoit previously served in the Air Force, continuing a family legacy in firefighting.
His death highlights health risks for Boston firefighters, prompting discussions on occupational safety.
